title: Skyward Dreams
description: changed your sky overlay  minecraft XD
body:
The image shows a vast, open sky filled with soft, scattered clouds. The upper part is a bright, clear blue, gradually blending into warmer pastel tones—pink, peach, and light purple—near the horizon. The clouds are fluffy and layered, with some areas appearing denser and casting subtle shadows.

Small dark silhouettes, possibly birds or distant objects, are scattered across the sky, adding a sense of movement and scale. The overall atmosphere feels calm and dreamy, almost like a peaceful sunset or sunrise moment captured in a stylized, slightly painterly way.
This texture pack only works with the optifine mod.
